(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2, b3
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b4, b5
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 4): b6, b7, b8, b9
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 9): b10, b11, b12, b13, b14, b15, b16, b17, b18
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top of b3
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b4 on top of b5
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b6 on top
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b10 on top
      (on-table b18)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Arm is empty
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)
